title: Wire LLMRouter into pi_agent.py — replace direct claude.messages.create calls
what_failed: pi_agent._respond_root called self.claude.messages.create() directly, bypassing the new router.
fix_applied: pi_agent.py: added self.router = LLMRouter(...) in __init__. _respond_root now uses self.router.chat(). Added _build_assistant_content() helper that converts LLMResponse into Anthropic canonical dict format. Tool loop rewritten to iterate resp.tool_calls (ToolCall dataclass) instead of native SDK ContentBlock objects. Model logged as provider/model string from LLMResponse.
